reviews.review_description: It’s entertaining when u first get it but after that it’s rinse and repeat, I get it’s your first game and that it’s a simulator but maybe update so you can buy other stuff or add new game mechanics
Thank you for your interest in our first game!

reviews.review_title: I love it definitely worth it😁!
reviews.review_description: W game bro keep up the good work

developer_response.body: Highly appreciate it, bro! Thanks for your support! ^^

reviews.review_description: The developer reached out to his followers personally and gave out 15 keys to they’re game. I wasn’t picked at first, but there was a open spot and they reached out. I just played some of the game and my little brother is playing now. We both enjoyed the game a lot and are excited to see what the game grows to.

developer_response.body: You're welcome guys! And thank you so much for your support, it means a lot to us! <3

reviews.review_description: When I was playing the menu at the start is really laggy and when I play it just crashes the game

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry that you had to face such difficulties. Assuming you played the game on Quest 1? 

In version 1.2 we've greatly improved the performance and optimized the game. It should now run as good and lag free as on Quest 2.

If you encounter any problems with the game, feel free to contact us via discord https://discord.gg/ZhUQwEearp and we'll try to fix any problems with the game as soon as possible!

* Sorry we couldn't respond sooner. Unfortunately, the developer reply feature was not working on our account.

reviews.review_description:
The games ok but the main gameplay feature is just touching a keyboard are slapping employees to get them back to work. Honestly, waste of money. And  I usually ramble out a six  paragraph review on games but not much to say. 
Needs more updates to be worth the price.

developer_response.body: We're sorry the game didn't live up to your expectations. But thank you so much for your opinion, we're attentive to the requests of our users. As a result, we've already added the feature to throw items at employees to make gameplay more varied and fun. This is a recent but of course far from final update :)

reviews.review_description: Very fun game) Good luck with your next games!)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support, we will do our best!

reviews.review_description: I’m trying to stop them from leaving and it won’t let me through the hallway so all of the people just leave and on the last day when I have a lot of people they all just leave because I can’t stop them because I can’t catch up to them thanks to this glich I haven’t had one good party since it’s only me at the end

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry that you had to face such difficulties. Assuming you played the game on Quest 1? 

In version 1.2 we've greatly improved the performance and optimized the game. It should now run as good and lag free as on Quest 2.

If you encounter any problems with the game, feel free to contact us via discord https://discord.gg/ZhUQwEearp and we'll try to fix any problems with the game as soon as possible!

* Sorry we couldn't respond sooner. Unfortunately, the developer reply feature was not working on our account.

reviews.review_description: Didn't expect it could end up being a lame party if you didn't make enough money 😂 and I have to say those crawling guys looks like me every Friday!

developer_response.body: Glad that you enjoyed! ^^ Hope that you got the best party after all :)
We're sorry to hear that. To make gameplay more varied and fun we've already added the feature to throw items at employees. This is a recent but of course far from final update :)

reviews.review_description: I have not played it yet but it looks fun and thx for the code

developer_response.body: You're welcome! ^^ Hope you enjoyed the game :)
